list.page_subtitle: Requests for additional services outside the standard cleaning contract. Pricing is proposed by the provider and approved by the customer before any work begins.
list.empty_state: No Extra Work requests yet. Create one to get started.
list.empty_filtered_desc: Try clearing one of the filters above.
create.page_subtitle: Build a cart of services you would like the provider to carry out. Lines with a pre-agreed price are scheduled immediately; lines without one go to a manager for a pricing proposal you can approve.
create.field_title_placeholder: Short summary, e.g. 'Strip and seal lobby floor'
create.field_description_helper: Please describe the extra work in as much detail as possible: exact area, room, surface, preferred date/time, urgency, access instructions, photos, and anything that affects pricing.
create.cart_section_helper: Add one or more services. Each line has its own requested date and optional note.
create.line_field_customer_note_placehol: Anything the provider should know about this line
create.error_building_customer_required: Building and customer must both be selected.
create.error_category_other_required: Please describe the unlisted category in the Other field.
create.error_no_access: No accessible building or customer. Ask your administrator to give you access.
create.warning_catalog_empty: No services are configured yet. An admin needs to set up the service catalog before Extra Work can be created.
create.warning_catalog_unavailable: The service catalog could not be loaded. Please refresh in a moment or contact support.
create.error_empty_cart: Add at least one service to the cart before submitting.
create.error_duplicate_service: Each service can only appear once in the cart. Remove the duplicate.
create.error_inactive_service: This service is no longer available.
create.error_line_service_required: Pick a service for every cart line.
create.error_line_requested_date_require: Requested date is required for every line.
result.heading: Request submitted
result.instant_processing: Your order is being processed — operational tickets will be created shortly.
result.proposal_pending: Your request has been sent for pricing review — you'll be notified when a proposal is ready.
result.routing_breakdown: {{contract}} of {{total}} line(s) match an active contract price; {{needsProposal}} need provider pricing.
detail.pricing_form_customer_note_placeh: Shown to the customer alongside this line
detail.workflow_customer_decision_helper: The provider has proposed pricing. Please review the lines above and approve or reject.
detail.workflow_no_transitions: No further transitions are available to you in this status.
detail.override_warning_body: Use only when the customer has agreed by phone, email, or another out-of-band channel. Every override is recorded in the status history with your name, the chosen outcome, and the reason you type below.
detail.override_inline_helper: This overrides the customer's decision and is recorded in the status history.
detail.override_reason_placeholder: e.g. Customer confirmed by phone on 2026-05-15 at 14:00. Their email follow-up is in the ticket thread.
detail.customer_decision_approve_success: Pricing approved. The provider will schedule the work shortly.
detail.retry_spawn_helper: No tickets have been scheduled for this approved request yet. Retry to spawn them now.
detail.retry_spawn_error_wrong_status: Cannot schedule work: request is not in the approved state.
detail.retry_spawn_error_already_done: Tickets are already scheduled for this request.
detail.retry_spawn_error_forbidden: You don't have permission to schedule work for this request.
detail.retry_spawn_error_generic: Could not schedule work. Check the request details and contact support.
detail.reject_dialog_description: Please tell the provider why you're rejecting this proposal. Your reason will appear on the request timeline.
detail.reject_dialog_placeholder: Too expensive, scheduling conflict, no longer needed…
detail.spawned_tickets_desc: Operational work generated from this Extra Work approval.
detail.spawned_tickets_empty: No tickets have been spawned from this Extra Work yet.
detail.cancel_dialog_body: This will move the request to Cancelled and write the status change to the audit log.
detail.cancel_dialog_spawned_warning_tit: 1 active ticket will remain after cancellation
{{count}} active tickets will remain after cancellation
detail.cancel_dialog_spawned_warning_des: Cancelling this Extra Work does not cancel its spawned tickets — those continue to be operational work. Close or approve them separately.
detail.direct_publish_dialog_warning_tit: This bypasses the customer approval step
detail.direct_publish_dialog_warning_des: The proposal will be marked CUSTOMER_APPROVED on the customer's behalf and operational tickets will be opened immediately. The customer will not be asked to approve or reject.
detail.direct_publish_reason_placeholder: e.g. Customer confirmed by phone on 2026-05-28 at 11:00; recording filed under ticket #4521. Direct-publish chosen to start work the same day.
